sizing_rule.note: Portfolio weightings optimized using unconstrained optimal f derived from equation: (arithmetic average HPR) - (variance of HPRs) = 1. Rebalance whenever markets are added/deleted. Specific optimal f values are not numerically specified in excerpt—determined dynamically by solving the variance-mean equation for each portfolio composition.

source_rule_text: Achieve greatest geometric growth by using portfolio weightings where the arithmetic average HPR minus its variance equals 1, rather than using static fractional f strategy
